headline: Europe seeks to defuse Trump criticism ahead of NATO summit in Ankara
description: Disoriented by a flurry of announcements regarding the stationing of US troops on the continent, European foreign ministers sought to convince Marco Rubio of their efforts to take greater responsibility for collective defense and to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Gunman killed by US Secret Service after opening fire near White House
Trump says agreement with Iran 'largely negotiated' and includes opening strait
Why dropping the worst-case climate scenario does not undermine the reality of global warming
description: A new generation of climate scenarios has set aside 'RCP8.5,' which projected a nearly 5°C rise in global temperatures by 2100. Donald Trump presents this as proof of 'alarmism' among climate scientists, but the new projections remain highly concerning.

headline: Google executive James Manyika criticizes France for sidestepping AI: 'It's terrible for the French user'
description: Google's senior vice president of technology and society regrets that the group's innovations are not being rolled out in France, a country he considers too resistant to change. He hopes to reassure the public about the risks artificial intelligence poses to jobs.

headline: 'Fjord' by Romania's Cristian Mungiu wins Cannes best film prize
description: Romanian director Mungiu took home the second Palme d'Or of his career for 'Fjord,' a film based on true events that questions the supposedly progressive values of Scandinavian society. The 79th edition of the film festival was star-studded, though Hollywood films were notably absent from the roster.

headline: Swedish transhumanist Nick Bostrom fears a 'pendulum swinging too far' against AI
description: The futurologist warns of the threat artificial intelligence poses to white-collar workers and the unprecedented existential crisis it could spark among the public, while also acknowledging its contributions to research and health care.

Paris left splits over awarding of city's marathon to Bolloré-linked company
Tamil cinema superstar Vijay makes spectacular political debut in India
description: Actor Joseph Vijay Chandrasekhar has stunned the country by winning regional elections in Tamil Nadu. The 51-year-old relied on his millions of fans and campaigned on a platform of change.

headline: What are the risks of the Ebola virus spreading beyond the DRC?
description: Estimating the true scale of the outbreak, as well as the risk of the virus spreading both within the region and beyond, has challenged researchers, who face an epidemic with many unknowns.

headline: Raul Castro is still pulling the strings in Cuba
description: At nearly 95 years old, Raul Castro, the former Cuban president who was indicted Wednesday in the United States for the killing of Americans, remains a central figure in Cuban politics. Washington appears to be using the same playbook it used in Venezuela to try to topple the regime.
